basic_details.job_title: SGPGIMS Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS)
basic_details.short_information: Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of SGPGIMS. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the SGPGIMS Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc./M.Tech in Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Life Science with minimum 60% marks or equivalent grade and must have qualified National level examinations with valid score card: DBT-JRF/BET-Category II, CSIR/UGC-JRF/NET-LS, ICMR-JRF, GATE or equivalent National level examinations
qualification.details: M.Sc./M.Tech in Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Life Science with minimum 60% marks or equivalent grade. Must have qualified National level examinations with a valid score card: DBT-JRF/BET-Category II, CSIR/UGC-JRF/NET-LS, ICMR-JRF, GATE or equivalent National level examinations.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SGPGIMS Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the SGPGIMS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for SGPGIMS Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SGPGIMS Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SGPGIMS Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the SGPGIMS Junior Research Fellow position is 30th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. or M.Tech degree in Biotechnology, Biochemistry, or Life Science with at least 60% marks. Additionally, they must have qualified in a national-level examination like DBT-JRF, CSIR-UGC-JRF, ICMR-JRF, or GATE.

faq.question: Q3. How will candidates be selected for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position at SGPGIMS will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted and called for an interview based on their qualifications and application.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000 plus 18% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the SGPGIMS Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application for the SGPGIMS Junior Research Fellow position must be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow post announced by SGPGIMS in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. Where is SGPGIMS located?
faq.answer: Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS) is located in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 226014.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment of Junior Research Fellow at SGPGIMS is R/14/2026-27.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from any state apply for this position?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for SGPGIMS in Uttar Pradesh. While the notification doesn't explicitly restrict applications by state, candidates should ensure they meet all eligibility criteria and are willing to work in Lucknow.
